name: What's average neck back settlement Utah work cases?
description: Median $200k all claims; comp varies lower.

mainEntity.name: What's average neck back settlement Utah work cases?

acceptedAnswer.text: Median $200k all claims; comp varies lower.
acceptedAnswer.description: **Utah neck/back medians $200k, averages $340k but workers' comp lower ~$20k-$100k by severity.** Depends on permanency.[9][5] Key factors: Impairment rating; surgery; wages. Not guaranteed; attorney values accurately.
